issues.title: The isFunctionalType method of MethodToolVNet Provider is incorrect, resulting in some cases where the tool cannot be registered

comments.body: This is a very serious bug. I have tools that return just the "Object" type and I cannot use them, because isFunctionalType returns true, which is obviously wrong.
Hi @TheEterna @jcgouveia , I pushed a PR to fix the issue, can you guys help review the PR https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/3479 ? Thank you.
